    10  
    11  // UsageSummaryDateOrg Global hourly report of all data billed by Datadog for a given organization.
    12  //
    13  // For SDK users only: all fields at this response level are accessible through the
    14  // `additionalProperties` map. Existing typed-field getters are unchanged. New billing
    15  // dimensions will not have typed-field getters. Use
    16  // [Get available fields for usage summary](https://docs.datadoghq.com/api/latest/usage-metering/get-available-fields-for-usage-summary/)
    17  // to enumerate every available key.
    18  type UsageSummaryDateOrg struct {
    19  	// The account name.
    20  	AccountName *string `json:"account_name,omitempty"`
    21  	// The account public id.
    22  	AccountPublicId *string `json:"account_public_id,omitempty"`
    23  	// Shows the 99th percentile of all agent hosts over all hours in the current date for the given org.
    24  	AgentHostTop99p *int64 `json:"agent_host_top99p,omitempty"`
    25  	// Shows the sum of all AI credits used by Agent Builder over all hours in the current date for the given org.
    26  	// Values are returned in micro-credits. Divide by 1,000,000 to get AI credits.
    27  	AiCreditsAgentBuilderAiCreditsSum *int64 `json:"ai_credits_agent_builder_ai_credits_sum,omitempty"`
    28  	// Shows the sum of all AI credits used by Bits AI Assistant over all hours in the current date for the given org.
    29  	// Values are returned in micro-credits. Divide by 1,000,000 to get AI credits.
    30  	AiCreditsBitsAssistantAiCreditsSum *int64 `json:"ai_credits_bits_assistant_ai_credits_sum,omitempty"`
    31  	// Shows the sum of all AI credits used by Bits AI Dev over all hours in the current date for the given org.
    32  	// Values are returned in micro-credits. Divide by 1,000,000 to get AI credits.
    33  	AiCreditsBitsDevAiCreditsSum *int64 `json:"ai_credits_bits_dev_ai_credits_sum,omitempty"`
    34  	// Shows the sum of all AI credits used by Bits AI SRE over all hours in the current date for the given org.
    35  	// Values are returned in micro-credits. Divide by 1,000,000 to get AI credits.
    36  	AiCreditsBitsSreAiCreditsSum *int64 `json:"ai_credits_bits_sre_ai_credits_sum,omitempty"`
    37  	// Shows the sum of all AI credits over all hours in the current date for the given org.
    38  	// Values are returned in micro-credits. Divide by 1,000,000 to get AI credits.
    39  	AiCreditsSum *int64 `json:"ai_credits_sum,omitempty"`

 10595  	if err = datadog.Unmarshal(bytes, &all); err != nil {
 10596  		return datadog.Unmarshal(bytes, &o.UnparsedObject)
 10597  	}
 10598  	additionalProperties := make(map[string]interface{})
 10599  	if err = datadog.UnmarshalUseNumber(bytes, &additionalProperties); err == nil {
 10600  	} else {
 10601  		return err
 10602  	}
